description: Primary deterministic condition for baseline comparison and main evaluation.
notes: Use this as the main low-cost condition. One repetition is sufficient because temperature is zero or near-deterministic, although providers may still vary slightly.

description: Low-stochasticity condition for measuring modest prompt/model variability.
notes: Two repetitions provide a small consistency check without multiplying API cost excessively.

description: Optional higher-stochasticity condition for stress-testing output stability.
notes: Disabled by default to control cost. Enable only after pilot runs confirm the pipeline and budget.
